```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
repeat {
  a <- sample(2:6,1); k <- sample(1:4,1); x <- runif(1,0.2*a,0.8*a)
  ans <- (x/a)^(k+1)
  vals <- round(c(ans,(x/a)^k,x/a,1-ans,(k+1)*x^k/a^(k+1)),4)
  if (length(unique(vals)) == 5L) break
}
opts <- sprintf("$%.4f$",vals)
```

Question
========
Uma variável tem densidade $f(x)=(`r k+1`)x^{`r k`}/`r a^(k+1)`$ em $(0,`r a`)$. Qual é $F_X(`r sprintf("%.2f",x)`)$?

Answerlist
----------
* `r opts[1]`
* `r opts[2]`
* `r opts[3]`
* `r opts[4]`
* `r opts[5]`

Solution
========
Para $0<x<a$,
$$F_X(x)=\int_0^x\frac{(k+1)t^k}{a^{k+1}}dt
=\left(\frac{x}{a}\right)^{k+1}.$$
No ponto informado, isso vale `r sprintf("%.4f",ans)`.

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap1S7Q3_FDA_continua
extype: schoice
exsolution: 10000
exshuffle: TRUE
